name: Oil of Slipperiness
description: One vial of this oil can cover one Medium or smaller creature, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying. Applying the oil takes 10 minutes. The affected creature then gains the effect of the Freedom of Movement spell for 8 hours.

creature_use.coverage: One Medium or smaller creature with equipment
creature_use.additional_vials: One additional vial for each size category above Medium
creature_use.effect: Freedom of Movement spell for 8 hours

ground_use.activation: Magic action to pour on ground
ground_use.effect: Grease spell effect in that area

properties.appearance: Sticky, black unguent; thick and heavy but flows quickly when poured
